title: coussarea obliqua
intro: Coussarea obliqua, also known as Coussarea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of Coussarea obliqua include relief from fever, headaches, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and aid in wound healing. Coussarea obliqua is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its leaves are also used in traditional remedies.
